name: Fresh Pesto Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 Sweet red pepper, cut into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the garlic in olive oil.
2. Add basil, 1/4 cup water, miso, lemon juice, and pine nuts to a blender or food processor.
3. Blend until smooth, adding more water if needed for desired consistency.
4. Cook pasta al dente according to package directions.
5. Drain the pasta.
6. Serve the pesto sauce over the cooked pasta, sprinkled with pine nuts and garnished with red pepper slivers.
